name: Sentilink
description: SentiLink provides identity verification and fraud scoring APIs focused on synthetic identity fraud and first-party fraud, two gaps most traditional KYC vendors miss. Its Synthetic Score, ID Complete and Facets APIs are widely used by US ba

seo.title: Sentilink — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Sentilink: SentiLink provides identity verification and fraud scoring APIs focused on synthetic identity fraud and first-party fraud, two gaps most traditional

when_to_use: Synthetic identity fraud scoring for US bank onboarding
First-party fraud detection for credit application review
ID Complete API for identity element consistency checks
Facets API for granular identity risk signal breakdown
Fraud consortium data enrichment for BNPL and lending

pros: Specialist on synthetic and first-party fraud
Fills a real gap in traditional KYC
Used widely across US banks and lenders
cons: Narrow scope, not a full identity suite
Relies on SSN ecosystem that may shift
review.verdict: A must-have layer for US lenders attacked by synthetic identities, but not a standalone KYC stack.
review.best_for: US banks, credit unions and lenders exposed to synthetic and first-party identity fraud.
review.not_for: International fintechs or teams without SSN-based flows.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
